Django Dynamic Serializer

Django Dynamic Serializer
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Install from PyPI with pip:

pip install django-dynamic-serializer

Requirements

  • Python >= 3.9

  • Django >= 3.2

  • Django REST Framework >= 3.0

No changes to INSTALLED_APPS are required — the library provides plain Python mixins with no models, migrations, or template tags.

Optional: django-virtual-models

For automatic query optimization driven by your serializer field selection, install the optional django-virtual-models integration:

pip install django-dynamic-serializer[virtual-models]

Or install django-virtual-models directly:

pip install django-virtual-models>=0.1.4

See Integration with django-virtual-models for a full guide on using this integration.
